task_completion.description: Verify that the Graphite Composer web interface is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Graphite Composer UI, typically with a graph area, a metric tree on the left, and a metric input box at the bottom or top.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct EC2 CPU utilization metric is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The string 'servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization' is visible in the active metrics list, metric input box, or graph legend.

task_completion.description: Verify that the movingAverage function is being applied to the metric.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'movingAverage' function is visible in the metric input box wrapping the metric, or a function menu dropdown is open showing 'movingAverage' being selected.

task_completion.description: Verify that the window parameter for the moving average is set to 10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A prompt, dialog box, or inline text in the metric box showing the number '10' provided as the argument for the movingAverage function.

task_completion.description: Verify that the final graph is rendered with the function and parameter correctly applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A plotted graph is visible in the Composer window, and the legend or active metric explicitly reads 'movingAverage(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, 10)'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Graphite Composer web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with a web browser and the Graphite web interface, not terminal commands (like curl) or Python scripts generating the graph.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just type the target string into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The target string 'movingAverage(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, 10)' must appear within the actual Graphite Composer interface, not in a text editor, notepad, or terminal window.

integrity.description: Ensure the graph is a genuine Graphite render.
integrity.visual_evidence: The graph should have the standard Graphite Composer visual styling (typically a black background with specific grid lines and legend formatting) and display actual time-series data, not an empty or mocked image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The metric 'servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization' contains real EC2 CPU utilization data from the NAB dataset. When correctly selected and visualized in Graphite Composer, it will render a valid time-series line graph showing CPU utilization over time, rather than an empty or blank graph.
